Skip to contents
ananke 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    Bibliography

Mean

Source: R/AllGenerics.R, R/statistics.R
mean.Rd

Mean

Usage

# S4 method for CalibratedAges
mean(x, na.rm = FALSE, ..., calendar = getOption("ananke.calendar"))

Arguments

x

A CalibratedAges object.

na.rm

A logical scalar: should NA values be stripped before the computation proceeds?

...

Currently not used.

calendar

A TimeScale object specifying the target calendar (see calendar()).

See also

Other statistics: interval_hdr(), median()

Author

N. Frerebeau

Examples

## Calibrate a single date
cal <- c14_calibrate(300, 20)

## Statistics
median(cal)
#>                [,1]
#>   [1,] 1.216321e-06
#>   [2,] 2.600831e-06
#>   [3,] 3.129368e-06
#>   [4,] 3.757790e-06

mean(cal)
#>       X1 
#> 1570.327 

## Plot
plot(cal, panel.first = graphics::grid())

#> [337,] 2.600831e-06

## Need to set 'calendar' to NULL
abline(v = median(cal, calendar = NULL), lty = 2, col = "blue")

#> [337,] 2.600831e-06
abline(v = mean(cal, calendar = NULL), lty = 2, col = "red")

On this page

ananke is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau.

Site built with pkgdown 2.0.7.
